sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 290 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1606/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 22.01.2026 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the applicant. 1. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2. Per learned counsel, question before this court has already been decided against the applicant department by virtue of Supreme Court judgment passed in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue Lahore vs. Millat Tractors Limited, Lahore and others reported as 2024 SCMR 700. In view hereof, learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference application, which is hereby dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
